objective: C1 smoke: validate PM lot-aware A-share probe sizing before any full-month run.

variables.custom: Only PM_EXPERIMENT_MODE changes to lot_aware_probe. Ordinary probe max=20%; high-price one-lot threshold=20%; cash floor=60%; single-name cap=30%; analysts, model, data, and indicators fixed.

fixed_indicators.description: Fixed trend snapshot: close, SMA20/SMA60, MACD, RSI14.
Fixed momentum/risk snapshot: 5d/10d/20d returns and 20d volatility.
